Risk_Description: Client-side storage (JSON + localStorage) means data doesn't sync across devices or browsers
Mitigation_Action: Run demos from a single shared device; document the limitation clearly for users

Risk_Description: Report form's required-field indicators were missed by testers (1 of 5 submissions failed in Lab 08)
Mitigation_Action: Increase visual weight of required-field markers and the inline error state

Risk_Description: Admin edit form's New Room field order confused 2 of 7 testers
Mitigation_Action: Reorder or auto-reveal the New Room field only when Room Changed is selected

Risk_Description: Students may not actually switch from the PDF timetable and group chats to SmartTimetable
Mitigation_Action: Track real usage/interest signals in a pilot rollout before final submission

Risk_Description: Report form's free-text Description field could unintentionally capture personal information
Mitigation_Action: Add guidance text next to the Description field; review submissions before any wider release

Risk_Description: Admin login is a simulated pass-through with no real authentication
Mitigation_Action: Clearly label as demo-only; replace with real authentication before production use

Risk_Description: Admin/lecturer staff may see reviewing and updating reports as extra unwanted work and not use the dashboard consistently
Mitigation_Action: Interview an actual RIC admin or lecturer about willingness to use it regularly
